#v(0.8em)

#block[Figure 1: Time history of the effective pion mass (distance \$8\$) for \$\\beta=5.30\$ and \$\\kappa=0.1677\$ on a \$16^3\\times 32\$ lattice. Symbols are: (\$\\times\$) HMC at \$\\delta\\tau=0.0069\$, (\$+\$) HMD at \$\\delta\\tau=0.0069\$, (\$\\bigcirc\$) HMD at \$\\delta\\tau=0.004\$. Also shown is the blocksize\$=40\$ (\$\\Diamond\$) HMC acceptance uncorrected for autocorrelations.]

Figures 1 through 1 preserve source-backed captions while replacing external graphics with deterministic placeholders.
